title: Warn on scheduling of non-inlined tasks/functions

features.name: recursive task with state modification
features.description: Code should include a task that recursively calls itself and modifies a state variable within the recursive call chain

features.name: task recursion controlled by parameter
features.description: Code should include a task with a parameter that controls whether to recurse, passing a different value on recursive call

features.name: combinational signal depending on state modified by recursive task
features.description: Code should include a combinational signal assignment that depends on a variable which is modified as a side effect of a recursive task call
features.snippet:
logic bar, qux;
assign qux = $c("1") & bar;
